message:
fix(cli): remove unused inProgress variable after stale-bead loop removal

The prior commit removed the dead stale-bead detection loop that was the
sole consumer of the inProgress list. This follow-up removes the now-
unused GetInProgressList call itself, eliminating a wasted bv query on
every assign invocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
